data.title: Xcel Energy First Quarter 2026 Earnings Report
data.description: Minneapolis-based Xcel Energy Inc. (NASDAQ: XEL) announced their first quarter 2026 GAAP earnings today, totaling $556 million, equivalent to $0.89 per share. This marks a significant increase from the first quarter of 2025 when they reported $483 million, or $0.84 per share. In terms of ongoing earnings, the company reported $567 million, or $0.91 per share for the first quarter of 2026, compared to $483 million, or $0.84 per share in the same period last year. The impact of unseasonably warm weather in the first quarter was noted as a contributing factor. For more details on the reconciliation from GAAP to ongoing earnings, refer to Note 6 in the report.

data.title: MintNeuro and Motif Neurotech Partner to Advance Miniature Brain-Computer Interface Therapy for Mental Health
data.description: In a significant development, MintNeuro has formed a strategic partnership with Motif, where MintNeuro's specialized neural sensing and stimulation chips will be integrated with Motif's compact therapeutic implant platform. This collaboration aims to facilitate precise neuromodulation and enable continuous real-time monitoring of responses. The alliance, announced on April 30, 2026 in London, is set to revolutionize the field by combining MintNeuro's cutting-edge technology with Motif's expertise in developing ultra-miniaturized implants. This partnership will potentially lead to advancements in neurotechnology, offering more effective solutions for various conditions.

data.title: From AI Adoption to Real Outcomes: New Sisense Research Reveals How Product Leaders Are Closing the Gap
data.description: In New York, a recent report titled the 2026 State of Analytics was released by Sisense. The report, based on a study of 267 product leaders, highlights a growing disparity between artificial intelligence (AI) aspirations and practical outcomes in the real world.

data.title: Introducing Jumio Watch: Because Identity Risk Doesn’t End at Onboarding
data.description: In Sunnyvale, California, Jumio has introduced Jumio Watch, a groundbreaking continuous identity intelligence service, marking a shift in how businesses handle identity risk. This innovative offering changes the traditional approach of identity verification by providing an ongoing intelligence signal rather than a one-time check. Jumio Watch aims to revolutionize the understanding and management of identity risk by offering dynamic and evolving monitoring. This marks a significant advancement in identity verification strategies, which have historically relied on static assessments.

data.title: Emera Inc. Announces Leadership Transition at Emera Energy
data.description: Emera Inc. declared the retirement of Judy Steele, President and Chief Operating Officer of Emera Energy, effective June 30, after a tenure of 26 years. Judy held various key positions during her career, including Chief Financial Officer of Emera Inc. and leading Emera Energy for the past 14 years. Under her leadership, Emera Energy expanded its presence across North America, enhancing its contributions to Emera’s operations. Judy's retirement marks the end of a significant era at Emera Energy.
The United Arab Emirates announced it is leaving OPEC in a surprise announcement on Tuesday. But what is OPEC and what does its future look like?

data.title: CRH Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In New York, CRH, a key player in the building materials sector, announced its financial results for the first quarter of 2026. Their total revenues stood at $7.4 billion, marking a 9% increase from the $6.8 billion reported in Q1 of 2025. The growth was fueled by strong underlying demand, effective commercial strategies, and acquisition contributions. However, the net loss for this quarter was ($0.2) billion, up from the ($0.1) billion loss in the same period last year. This increase was primarily attributed to higher depreciation, impairment charges, and increased intangible costs.

data.title: Ermenegildo Zegna Group Announces Publication of the Convocation Notice for Its 2026 Annual General Meeting
data.description: Ermenegildo Zegna N.V. disclosed the convocation notice for its Annual General Meeting (AGM) to be held on June 26, 2026, at 12:00 p.m. CET in Amsterdam. The meeting will take place at the Steigenberger Airport Hotel Amsterdam. The company, listed as ZGN on NYSE, stated that the AGM will convene at Stationsplein ZW 951, 1117 CE Schiphol-Oost, the Netherlands. The AGM will address crucial matters and provide insights into the Group's operations.

data.title: No Script, Just Stories: S.Pellegrino's 'Dinner Dialogues' Captures the Real, Genuine Bonds that Lewis Hamilton and His Friends Bring to the Table
data.description: S.Pellegrino launches a new worldwide campaign focusing on fostering connections by converting its famous bottle into a set of compelling questions. The initiative features Lewis Hamilton engaging in spontaneous discussions with lifelong friends. The activation aims to promote meaningful interactions and emphasize the importance of human connection. The campaign was unveiled in Milan on April 30th, 2026.

data.title: National University and South Orange County Community College District Announce New Transfer Partnership Expanding Educational Pathways
data.description: Building on a statewide initiative, a new local agreement in Irvine, California was announced on April 30, 2026. The agreement involves National University (NU), a nonprofit institution established by Veterans, that caters to over 130,000 individuals including working professionals, military personnel, and those seeking to advance their careers. This agreement is part of a wider effort towards enhancing transfer opportunities and facilitating degree completion throughout California.

data.title: IDEAYA Biosciences to Initiate New Drug Application Submission from the Darovasertib OptimUM-02 Trial under the Oncology Center of Excellence Real-time Oncology Review (RTOR) Program
data.description: The Phase 2/3 registrational trial named OptimUM-02 for the darovasertib combination has successfully achieved its primary goal. The results of the trial will be shared in a late-breaking oral presentation at ASCO 2026. After this, IDEAYA will commence the submission process for RTOR, with the initial pre-submission scheduled for May. Following this, the NDA filing process will be completed.

data.title: Best Travel Blogs to Follow (2026): Westgate Resorts Named #1 Travel Blog by Consumer365
data.description: On April 30, 2026, Consumer365 revealed in a recent travel content review that Westgate Resorts has secured the top spot as the leading travel blog to follow. The acknowledgment underscores Westgate Resorts' travel blog for its frequent updates and wide-ranging content offerings.

data.title: AH Realty Trust Advances Board Refreshment Process to Support Ongoing Strategic Transformation
data.description: The nomination of Theodore Bigman and Lori Wittman as new independent directors has been announced for the 2026 Annual Meeting. These new potential directors bring fresh perspectives and expertise to the board, indicating a positive shift towards diversification and growth. The board of directors is aiming to enhance the strategic decision-making process by nominating individuals with unique backgrounds and skills. Shareholders will have the opportunity to vote on these nominations during the upcoming annual meeting, potentially influencing the direction and governance of the company. This move signifies a proactive approach towards ensuring effective leadership and governance, with a focus on long-term success and value creation for stakeholders.

data.title: Ermenegildo Zegna Group Reports a Solid Start of the Year With Q1 2026 Revenues at €470 Million Driven by Strong DTC Performance1
data.description: In Milan, Ermenegildo Zegna N.V. revealed today that in the first quarter of 2026, the company generated unaudited revenues amounting to €470.2 million. This marked a 2.5% year-over-year increase and a 7.4% organic growth compared to the €458.8 million in the first quarter of 2025. Ermenegildo “Gildo” Zegna, the Executive Chairman of the Group, expressed satisfaction with the performance, stating, "We started 2026 with positive momentum observed across all our brands, resulting in a 7% organic growth for the Group."
